text:
BOTTOM LINE — Risk-off rotation, energy sole bright spot. Broad selloff hit tech and industrials amid freight weakness and Amazon disruption, countered by oil spike to $110 on Strait of Hormuz tensions. Capital fled semis and housing into XLE as Mag7 faltered.

INDICES — VIX 18.3 up. QQQ -0.19%, SPY -0.37%, IWM -0.50%, DIA -1.10%. Large > small by 0.31pp. USO +3.37% most notable cross-asset.

VOLUME — Elevated vol in gaining IJH 1.2x, RSP 1.1x; declining in QQQ 0.8x, DIA 0.8x, IJR 0.7x. SPY vol_ratio neutral, QQQ 0.8x + price down signals distribution. Sectors show XLY/XLF 1.4x accumulation despite losses.

SECTORS — XLE Energy +0.92%, XLK Technology +0.11%, XLV Healthcare -0.30%, XLU Utilities -0.39%, XLC Comms -0.53%, XLRE Real Estate -0.54%, XLF Financials -0.65%, XLP Staples -0.75%, XLY Discretionary -0.77%, XLI Industrials -1.14%, XLB Materials -1.36%. Top industries WGMI +4.79%, USO +3.37%; bottom XTN -5.06%, REMX -4.13%.

THE 7s — Top5: Software +1.30% (strongest Alphabet, weakest Meta), Cloud +1.10%, Energy +0.97%, Buildout +0.42%, Power +0.40%. Bot5: Freight -4.80% (weakest UPS/FDX), Housing -3.43%, Semi -2.28%, New Metals -1.90%, Bank -1.60%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Jun 17, CME hold 100%. Stance Hawk6 (Cook et al), Neutral5 (Powell et al), Dove4 (Bowman et al). USD stress 41/100 Normal, most-stressed CP-Tbill 86th percentile.

POSITIONING — SPY PCR_vol 1.51 elevated protection, skew +5.9% fear; QQQ PCR_vol 1.32, skew +11.6%. GEX flips distant. MOVE 77.9 above 20d MA signals bond vol stress.

CROSS-ASSET — Oil +3.37% via USO lifted XLE +0.92%, bucked equity slide on Hormuz rejection. Dollar +0.26% pressured GLD -2.00%, SLV -3.44%.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 63.2 Greed. Top movers UPS -10.47% Freight7, FDX -9.11% Freight7, RSPD -2.19% EW. 20d momo best XLK +18.47%, Cloud +13.68%; worst XLE -0.49%, Defense -10.20%. Vol spikes UPS/FDX distribution on Amazon news.

WATCH — UPS -10.47% vol 3.4x distribution. FDX -9.11% vol 3.5x Amazon pressure. RSPD -2.19% 4.8x vol amid XLY focus.
